summary: Non-public draft example release record for early KOB release packet planning.

target_products.reason: Example product scope only, not a live public release.

goals.summary: Record bounded release scope and evidence without replacing the Version Goal Ledger.
goals.reason: Example release goals can point at ledger goals while the ledger remains the roadmap contract.

included_items.reason: Included for release evidence alignment only. Membership does not reparent the task.
Adds the initial release record schema contract.

deferred_items.reason: Example follow-up workflow automation stays out of the draft release scope.

validation_refs.reason: Schema and fixture reviewed as draft examples.
KOB-TSK-0091 evidence bundle that bounds draft release-note claims.

limitations.summary: Example only, no live public artifact publication is claimed.
limitations.reason: Human publication gate from KOA-TSK-0216 is intentionally not crossed.

release_notes_artifact_refs.reason: Non-public draft release notes artifact generated from release-notes-evidence-bundle-v0-1-0.

public_docs_refs.reason: Placeholder URL shape only, not a live public page.

readiness_gate_refs.reason: KOB-TSK-0092 readiness gate report that blocks unverified release claims.

public_docs_handoff_refs.reason: KOB-TSK-0093 handoff report for draft public docs and publication evidence boundaries.
